历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 5847 → 4504 → 9172 → 6448 → 4677, showing significant fluctuations; a clear gap occurred in 2023 (9172), rebounded to 6448 in 2024, and further recovered to 4677 in 2025, with a continuous recovery trend in recent two years, with a baseline of about 4677 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Qinghai Province for Physics Category was 28 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 33 in 2024, and 30 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 31, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, a slight expansion of about 3.3%, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) shares the main campus's Soft Science ranking, ranking about 80th on the main list in 2026, stable around 80th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of science and engineering universities nationwide; reputation was slightly negative in 2025 (hot majors' admission scores plummeted), and negative in 2026 (involving academic misconduct incidents); Douyin heat total ranking 77th, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms, no obvious signal of increased application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hefei University of Technology's Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A-class discipline; Xuancheng Campus mainly offers engineering majors, closely related to the main campus's advantageous disciplines such as Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, and Software Engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remains high; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 48,000 (uncertain), with an estimated Physics Category of about 30,864 based on historical proportions, a slight increase of about 1.3% compared to 30,457 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the university is located in Xuancheng City, Anhui Province, in East China, which is an inter-provincial study for Qinghai candidates; the small scale of Qinghai candidates and the low proportion of enrollment plans in Qinghai mean regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4677, a slight expansion of 3.3% in the 2026 plan, a slight increase of about 1.3% in Physics Category candidates in the province, and a negative reputation, taking into account the dual effects of expansion easing competition and increased candidates intensifying competition, as well as the negative reputation possibly suppressing application enthusiasm, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 4800, with a range of 4300–5300.

In 2026, the main campus's soft science ranking is approximately 80th, placing it among the upper-middle tier of science and engineering universities nationwide.
